LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES, COSTS, AND EXPENSES. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING TO AWARD PLAINTIFF A REVISED AMOUNT OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR A TOTAL OF $19,460.55. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE MODIFIED TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Apr-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ASHLEY BURNSTAD's Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Expenses.

Appearances:

Elliot Conn, Esq., of Conn Law, PC, in person, (415) 417-2780, for Plaintiff.

Alexander Y. Kim, Esq., of Squire Patton Boggs (US) LLP, via Zoom videoconference, (213) 630-4422, for Defendant.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court modifies its tentative ruling and awards Plaintiff a total amount of $19,460.55 in attorney's fees.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the above modified tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-11-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
